utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (6 total). The final property solution includes all six sections. Each section is fully detailed: property includes type, location, size, price, features, and relevant dates; financing includes type, down payment, term, processing fees, and timeline; legal_services includes package, cost, and completion date; moving_services includes package, cost, special features, and move date; setup_services includes package, cost, list of utilities, and setup timeline; total_budget includes a full cost breakdown with totals. All items are fully specified according to the format.
